title: Paraglider survives mid-air collision with plane over Austria
full_text:
Paraglider survives mid-air collision with plane over Austria
Paraglider survives mid-air collision with plane over Austria
Dramatic bodycam video captured the moment a sightseeing plane tore through the parachute of an Austrian paraglider. The 44-year-old woman spun through the air before deploying her reserve chute and making an emergency landing.
Published On 25 May 2026
